programs.title: Secret Garden
programs.description: 5/5. David Attenborough reveals how a remote garden on Scotland's west coast has become an oasis for barn owls and pine martens as they battle the elements to feed, breed and survive. [S,AD,SL] [HD]

programs.description: Kelly Cates presents highlights from the day's four Premier League games. [S] [HD]

programs.title: Impossible
programs.description: 16/30. Game show in which players score points by answering questions correctly while avoiding the impossible answers. [S] [HD]

programs.title: Mastermind
programs.description: 1/31. In the first heat of the series, Clive Myrie puts four contenders to the test on specialist subjects including Peaky Blinders and Team GB at the 2020 Summer Olympics. [S] [HD]

programs.title: Lightning
programs.description: 21/25. Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts the quickfire quiz where six plucky contestants must stay out of the light to be alright. Can anyone beat the lightning and win the £3,000 jackpot? [S] [HD]

programs.title: Clean It, Fix It
programs.description: 3/15. The team visit west London to help the Parkinson family. With four young children, their house is overrun with toys and the hallway is a dumping ground. [S] [HD]

programs.title: Big Cats 24/7
programs.description: 4/6. The Okavango Delta is transformed by the arrival of the flood, bringing new challenges for the big cats. The lion cubs experience water and the danger it brings for the first time. [S,AD] [HD]

programs.title: Vintage Antiques Roadshow
programs.description: 13/26. With Michael Aspel. On a second visit to Royal Holloway College, discoveries include a belt clasp connecting Annie Oakley with Queen Victoria, and a rare gold watch. [S]

programs.title: Flog It!
programs.description: The Flog It! team get frightened as Paul Martin heads to the spooky Dartmoor landscape, and Caroline Hawley and Mark Stacey find strange things in the queue. [S] [HD]

programs.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programs.description: 31/100. Deirdre O'Kane, Jay Rayner, Tessa Sanderson and Iwan Thomas test their general knowledge skills on this week's House of Games. [S] [HD]

programs.title: Great Central Asian Railway Journeys
programs.description: 1/5. Michael Portillo embarks on a thrilling new railway adventure following the Silk Road through the most populous country of Central Asia, Uzbekistan. [S,AD] [HD]

programs.title: This Farming Life
programs.description: 10/12. Andrew and Gayle's baby boy arrives amidst the busy summer season, the dairy shed build takes its toll on Adam's leg, and Ally and his crofting pals shear sheep on a remote island. [S] [HD]

programs.title: The Elon Musk Show
programs.description: 2/3. Elon Musk is working hard to revolutionise the car market and take mankind to Mars. But first, he must weather a global financial crisis to realise his interplanetary mission. [S,AD] [HD]

programs.title: Children of the Blitz
programs.description: Some of the last survivors of the Blitz, children who weren't evacuated, tell their story. Contains scenes which some viewers may find upsetting. [S,AD] [HD]

programs.title: Newsnight, followed by Weather
programs.description: Insights and global interviews on the news stories of the day. With Victoria Derbyshire. [S] [HD] Followed by Weather.

programs.title: A Bigger Splash
programs.description: A convalescing rock star and her partner receive an unexpected visit while on holiday. Contains strong language and some scenes of a sexual nature. [2015] [S] [HD]

currentProgram.description: Action from the Australian Football League as Melbourne host West Coast Eagles at Marvel Stadium. The Demons cruised to a 139-56 win when these sides last faced off.

programs.title: Reframe the Game

programs.title: Cycling: Tro Bro Leon

programs.description: Action from stage one of the Baku-Khankendi Azerbaijan Cycling Race 2026, which sees the riders depart from Sea Breeze, Baku, on a 158km route to Sumgayit.

programs.title: Live: Baku-Khankendi - Stage 2
programs.description: Stage two of the Baku-Khankendi Azerbaijan Cycling Race 2026. This 193km route passes through the historic city of Shamakhi before reaching the mountain region of Ismayilli.

programs.title: The Big Interview: Calvert-Lewin
